overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, transitioning from outdoor urban streets and plazas to a neon-lit indoor commercial gallery. The footage showcases high-rise buildings with glass facades, digital billboards, and vibrant neon lighting typical of the Cyberpunk 2077 game engine.

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street, briefly looking up at the towering skyscraper before continuing

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic city street at dusk, passing parked vehicles and pedestrians. The camera briefly tilts up to admire a massive dark skyscraper before continuing through the concrete plaza area.

events.description: ascending wide concrete stairs toward the building entrance

wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving through an urban plaza with concrete planters and benches, ascending a wide staircase. A large vertical digital billboard illuminates the left side while the dark skyscraper remains visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian alley between corporate skyscrapers with digital advertising

tall glass and steel office building with green interior lighting visible through windows

segments.scene_description: Navigating a narrow alleyway between towering corporate buildings, with bright digital billboards lining the right wall. The space feels enclosed with limited sky visibility, creating an intimate urban canyon atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to indoor commercial gallery entrance between skyscrapers

events.description: approaching automatic glass entrance doors leading to indoor commercial space

agents.ego_description: walking toward the entrance of a covered commercial gallery, passing the last of the outdoor billboards

entered.detail: automatic glass doors with metal frames leading into the indoor gallery
bright warm interior lighting visible through the glass entrance

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the narrow alley where automatic glass doors lead into a brightly lit interior space. The surrounding skyscrapers frame the entrance, and the transition from outdoor to indoor lighting becomes apparent.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale indoor shopping gallery with glass atrium and neon advertisements

events.description: passing through glass doors into the indoor commercial gallery with glass roof

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit indoor gallery observing the digital advertisements, reflective floors, and modern architecture

entered.detail: triangular glass roof structure allowing remaining dusk light to filter through
large suspended digital screens displaying colorful animated advertisements
illuminated food kiosk with bright menu displays and neon signage
tall bamboo plants in raised interior planters adding greenery to the space
highly polished marble floor reflecting the neon lights and overhead screens

segments.scene_description: Inside a modern commercial gallery with a glass atrium ceiling, highly reflective floors, and vibrant neon lighting. Overhead digital screens display advertisements while bamboo plants and food kiosks line the walkway, creating a futuristic indoor shopping environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, dusk-lit streets of a futuristic city into the vibrant, neon-glow of an indoor commercial gallery. It begins by gliding past parked vehicles and pedestrians, briefly tilting upward to capture a massive dark skyscraper before moving through a concrete plaza. As the camera ascends a wide staircase flanked by a towering digital billboard, the scene shifts into a narrow alleyway that creates an intimate urban canyon between corporate buildings. The path then leads toward automatic glass doors that frame the exit of the alley, marking a clear transition from the dim outdoor light to a brightly lit interior. Finally, the camera enters a modern gallery featuring a glass atrium ceiling and reflective floors, where overhead digital screens and neon lighting illuminate a walkway lined with bamboo plants and food kiosks.
